metadata.description: 字符串基础: String is an immutable sequence. ' and " are used to define strings. f-string is the best format for string interpolation: `f'value: {x}'`. Here's a brief Python code example using f-strings: ```python x = 42 print(f'value: {x}') # Output: value: 42 ``` This example demonstrates how to use an f-string to embed expressions inside string literals, which are replaced with their values.

data_pointers.title: 字符串基础
